title: PEDAL COMMANDER for Jeep Wrangler JK 2007-2018 X Sahara Rubicon Willys Wheeler Black Edition 2.8L 3.6L 3.8L Petrol Diesel - Throttle Response Controller
features: Wrangler JK Accessories: Pedal Commander tunes the delay from your electronic gas pedal, allowing your Wrangler JK to accelerate faster, giving your vehicle a night-and-day difference in performance

36 Adjustable Settings: Equipped with 4 different modes: Eco, City, Sport, and Sport +. Each mode has an additional 36 adjustable settings to fine-tune to your liking, making it one of the must-have Wrangler JK accessories
Eco Mode: The Pedal Commander throttle response controller significantly slows throttle response to improve efficiency

Quick & Easy Installation: The Pedal Commander throttle response controller is a simple plug-and-play device that takes only about 10 minutes to install. Now, you can control the unit using our free Pedal Commander app
Will not void your warranty: Pedal Commander will not void the warranty on your Wrangler JK or leave any trace behind on your ECU.
description: Product Description Pedal Commander Throttle Response Controller For Jeep Wrangler JK 2007-2018 Previous page Next page 1 Yes, Just in 10 Minutes! 2 What`s in the box? 3 Backed by the pros 4 Installation Pedal Commander enhances throttle response for your Wrangler JK, allowing quicker access to existing horsepower without adding power. It complements various vehicle mods like tuners, programmers, cold air intakes, and performance chips. Pedal Commander will not leave "flags" on the ECU.
